events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Since the fixtures are still sealed with the rating/marking side hidden, there's no way to confirm they match the drawing's specified size/class against NEC 410's listing and marking requirements — so this is a `needs_more_info` hold rather than a pass or fail, with the fixture kept out of the install sequence until the nameplate can be verified.
